intro_sentences.en: Let's study the simple future of to have.
intro_sentences.pt-BR: Vamos estudar o futuro simples de ter.
intro_sentences.es-ES: Vamos a estudiar el futuro simple de tener.
intro_sentences.fr-FR: Étudions le futur simple de avoir.

sample_sentences.en: The verb to have is very common in the future.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: O verbo ter é muito comum no futuro.
sample_sentences.es-ES: El verbo tener es muy común en el futuro.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Le verbe avoir est très courant au futur.

sample_sentences.en: I will have more time tomorrow.
You will have a good idea soon.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Você terá uma boa ideia em breve.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Tú tendrás una buena idea pronto.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Tu auras bientôt une bonne idée.

sample_sentences.en: He will have a meeting this afternoon.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Ele terá uma reunião esta tarde.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Él tendrá una reunión esta tarde.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Il aura une réunion cet après-midi.

sample_sentences.en: She will have a red bag.
We will have time before lunch.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Nós teremos tempo antes do almoço.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Nosotros tendremos tiempo antes del almuerzo.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Nous aurons du temps avant le déjeuner.

sample_sentences.en: You all will have the same teacher.
They will have a new apartment next year.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Eles terão um apartamento novo no próximo ano.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Ellos tendrán un apartamento nuevo el próximo año.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Ils auront un nouvel appartement l’année prochaine.
